label: environment
prompt: An aesthetic Gen Z teenager's bedroom, empty with no people. Soft warm and pink LED strip lighting glowing along the wall edges, a few small potted plants, delicate fairy string lights, a cozy neutral-toned bed with a tufted headboard and soft pillows, a couple of minimalist framed posters, light wood and white furniture, clean tidy uncluttered aesthetic. Bright soft natural daylight from a window mixing with the warm LED glow. Cozy, trendy, TikTok-native vibe. Single normal room, one bed only, no duplicate furniture. Suitable as the single consistent setting for the video, photorealistic, high detail.

label: grid-1-hook-problem
prompt: A 3x3 grid of the exact same trendy 19-year-old East Asian woman from the first reference image — identical identity, face, long dark hair, and wardrobe (a plain solid-colour casual top, no logos). She is in the aesthetic pink-lit bedroom from the second reference, sitting on the bed in a different relaxed position and a different camera angle in each of the nine shots, but looking directly at the camera in all nine shots. Lively, playful, sassy Gen Z TikTok energy — expressive raised eyebrows, smirks, animated direct-to-camera expressions, big relatable reactions. Identical wardrobe, hair, and warm lighting across all nine shots. Single normal bedroom, one bed only, no duplicate furniture, anatomically correct hands. Photorealistic, high detail.
